message:
chore(deps): Update Node.js dependencies to latest stable versions

Updates package.json with latest compatible dependency versions.
This is a routine maintenance update performed via the library-updater workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,13 +31,13 @@
     "test:integration": "PHAGE_INTEGRATION=1 bun test --test-name-pattern integration packages/core packages/comparison packages/db-runtime packages/db-schema packages/renderer-3d packages/state packages/data-pipeline packages/tui packages/web/src"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
-    "@types/bun": "^1.3.3",
+    "@types/bun": "^1.3.6",
     "@types/pako": "^2.0.4",
-    "@types/react": "^19.2.7",

     "@types/three": "^0.182.0",
-    "eslint": "^9.39.1",

     "playwright": "^1.57.0",
     "typescript": "^5.9.3",
